title: More Nonsense Limerick 25
content:
There was an old person of Fife,
    Who was greatly disgusted with life;
    They sang him a ballad, 
    And fed him on salad,
    Which cured that old person of Fife.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 25"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
